story.asA: company admin inviting a new member
story.iWant: see and copy the invitation link
story.soThat: manually share it while email sending is not implemented

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
1. **AC1 – Show Invitation Link After Creation** - After successful invitation creation, show success state in dialog - Display full invitation URL prominently - Show email address the invitation was sent to - Show expiration date (7 days) - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
2. **AC2 – Copy Button with Feedback** - "Copiar link" button copies full URL to clipboard - Use `navigator.clipboard.writeText()` - Visual feedback: button text changes to "✓ Link copiado!" - Feedback resets after 2 seconds - Fallback for browsers without clipboard API - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
3. **AC3 – Pending Invitations List** - Show list of all pending invitations for company - Display: email, status, created date, expires date - "Copy link" action for pending invitations - "Revoke" action for pending invitations (sets status to 'expired') - List updates after create/revoke actions - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
4. **AC4 – 10-User Freemium Limit** - Before creating invitation, check user count - Count current `users` where `company_id = current_company` - Count pending `invitations` for same company - If total >= 10, block invitation creation - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
5. **AC5 – Limit Reached UI** - When limit reached, show warning message: - "Limite atingido (10 usuários)" - "O plano gratuito permite até 10 usuários." - "Para convidar mais pessoas, entre em contato para upgrade." - Disable "Send Invite" button - Show "Entrar em contato" link - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
6. **AC6 – API Returns Full URL** - `/api/invitations/create` returns `inviteUrl` field - URL format: `{NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/join?token={token}` - Handle missing env var gracefully - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
7. **AC7 – List Invitations API** - Create `/api/invitations/list` endpoint - Returns all invitations for current company - Supports filtering by status - Sorted by created_at descending - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]
8. **AC8 – Revoke Invitation API** - Create `/api/invitations/revoke` endpoint - Sets invitation status to 'expired' - Only company admins can revoke - Returns success/error response - [Source: docs/epics.md#story-2.3-invitation-link-copy-limit]

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: System shall support user invitations via email with role assignment (Admin/Member)

doc.title: Technical Specification for Epic 2
doc.snippet: Invitation API (`src/app/api/invitations/accept/route.ts`, `create/route.ts`, `list/route.ts`): valida token, atualiza `invitations.status`, retorna link copiável e aplica limite de 10 usuários.

doc.title: Database Schema
doc.snippet: invitations: token, email, company_id, role, expires_at, status, created_at, id

doc.title: Epics and Stories
doc.section: Story 2.3: Invitation Link Copy & User Limit
doc.snippet: As a company admin inviting a new member, I want to see and copy the invitation link, So that I can manually share it while email sending is not implemented.

artifact.reason: Defines the Invitation data structure used throughout the app
Defines the contract for invitation data access operations
Implements invitation repository using Supabase client
API endpoint to accept invitations and update user company association
API endpoint to create new invitations with secure tokens
Client component for invitation acceptance UI (needs rewrite to remove fake UUID)

constraints.constraint: Use Supabase server client (createSupabaseServerClient) in API routes for proper RLS enforcement
Repository Pattern: All data access through interfaces and Supabase implementations
Strict TypeScript: Explicit types for all props, params, returns
Company-based multi-tenancy: All operations scoped by company_id with RLS
Invitation tokens: Secure random 32-byte hex strings with 7-day expiration
User limit: Enforce 10-user freemium limit (current users + pending invitations)
UI: Click-stop protocol for interactive elements, data-avatar-interactive attributes

interface.name: Invitation API
interface.signature: POST /api/invitations/create { email, role, companyId } → { success, invitation: { token, expiresAt, inviteUrl } }

interface.name: Invitation List API
interface.signature: GET /api/invitations/list?companyId={id}&status={status} → { invitations: [{ id, email, status, createdAt, expiresAt, inviteUrl }], total, limit, remaining }

interface.name: IInvitationRepository
interface.signature: findByToken(token: string): Promise<Invitation | null>; create(data): Promise<Invitation>; updateStatus(token, status): Promise<Invitation | null>

tests.standards: Vitest for unit tests, Testing Library for component tests, Playwright for E2E tests. Test coverage >70% for core features.

ideas.idea: Test invitation creation with user limit enforcement (AC4)
Test copy button functionality with clipboard API (AC2)
Test invitation acceptance flow with valid token (AC1)
Test limit reached UI and error handling (AC5)
Test pending invitations list display and revoke action (AC3)
Test API returns full invitation URL (AC6)
Test list and revoke invitation APIs (AC7, AC8)
